item.title: Who runs the world?
item.description: From Toni Nady https://www.instagram.com/p/CanduCBF5rF/ See also: Dance tutorial of the “BlackRock Top Rock” https://imgur.com/a/GKoDrXL I think I'm gonna need a lot more of the disturbing facts about the world explained to me by cute, weird ladies doing interpretive dance, from now on. Maybe I should try interpretive dance explanations instead of trying to hit people with some meme-based knowledge: https://imgur.com/gallery/7S8CnMo If you want to fight this, it's pretty simple. You've already completed the hardest step, which is realising and accepting what's going on. -Join your union. -Switch to industry-owned superannuation. -Join your Labor party and help out where you can. -Connect with other like-minded people and organise for change.
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Looks like fun

hemithecomix

item.title: Mormon student pranks his Pro-Life mom into thinking he got a stripper pregnant and mom tells him to have her get an abortion
item.description:
A BYU student was paid $500 to prank call his Mormon pro-life mother and try to convince her he got a stripper pregnant. It didn't take long to convince her of that part—she didn't seem to have any issue believing her conservative Mormon son would have sex with strippers. Instead, she immediately began questioning the imaginary woman in the situation, asking how she could possibly know she was pregnant already which means this woman, this mother, understands it often takes weeks before you know you're pregnant. A caption in the TikTok video points out how many states have rules in place that expect a woman to know at or before 4 weeks. After dwelling on the time-line for a moment, the mother immediately advises her son to tell the woman to get an abortion.
The young man, shocked at how quickly and nonchalantly his mother tossed abortion out as the solution—regardless of legality, the strong moral and religious stance she's allegedly held or accessibility issues since this is Utah and clearly not a case of rape or incest—questioned if she was serious. "Mom, no!" he gasped. Without missing a beat, pro-lifer mom confirmed she was serious. Then she asked where he found a stripper, throwing a little extra disgust on it as if the imaginary woman carrying her imaginary grandchild was something to be spat on. He tried making up a story, but eventually his shock got the better of him and he told her the truth about the prank. Mom hung up wordlessly. The clip was reposted to TikTok as a reminder "that rich White conservatives will ALWAYS have access to safe abortions, and have no problem utilizing this privilege when it impacts them." Source with video: https://www.comicsands.com/mormon-prolife-mom-stripper-pregnant-2657654938.html
item.dc:creator: Igotfourbedrats

I hope it got through to them

The InContext YouTube page is here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=toTZ2VmV4sY Happy edit: @mayorofdrixdale found out who she is: "Her name is Naira Tamminga. https://www.woodtv.com/news/grand-rapids/i-am-frustrated-gr-teens-powerful-speech-at-city-meeting-goes-viral/" Wanna give their comment an upvote? item.title: Prime Bezos' Wallet Day is more like it
item.description: Some small businesses list on Amazon just to be found. Ships/Sold By Amazon: Amazon purchased this wholesale and is reselling. Ships from Amazon, sold by XYZ: XYZ is paying Amazon to stock and deliver their products. Ships/Sold By XYZ: Third party seller listing on Amazon. They pay a fee to Amazon on sales. These are the small businesses that need your support.
item.dc:creator: SpecialBrownies

item.title: Coming out as trans at work and publicly tomorrow. Wish me luck?
item.description: Figured I was actually a lady (albeit a foul-mouthed one) three years ago. Tomorrow I'm finally sharing this fact with everyone at work, as well as the public, after having been closely closeted for a while. Excuse the crap stress doodle art. Wish me luck? I rarely post anything, but figured this was the sort of thing a good millenial should post about the night before the fact. In 9h, if all goes well, my new name will be updated to the company's systems, and I'll send an email explaining why my name's suddenly different in our chat client and so forth. Then cometh ye olde coming out post on social media. I'm pretty excited, but nervous. Hiding who you are can feel like the safest thing to do, but most of the time it takes more energy than being yourself. Anyways, be good to eachother!
item.dc:creator: BitchCake

item.title: Your jogging style can brighten someone's day, make happen.

item.title: Jim Jordan Called 10 Year Old Ohio Rape Victim A Liar Then Deleted His Tweet When The Rapist Confessed
item.description:
The Columbus Dispatch reported that the rapist confessed twice, “Gershon Fuentes, 27, whose last known address was an apartment on Columbus’ Northwest Side, was arrested Tuesday after police say he confessed to raping the child on at least two occasions. He’s since been charged with rape, a felony of the first degree in Ohio.” Jim Jordan didn’t apologize. He offered no explanation for why he decided to delete his tweet. Jordan quietly deleted his tweet and pretended like he didn’t smear a ten-year-old rape victim who was forced to go to Indiana for an abortion because “pro-life” Republicans like Jim Jordan have banned the procedure in Ohio. Rep. Jordan is showing the sort of lack of character that made him one of the members of Congress who helped Trump plan to overthrow the government.  Jim Jordan is unfit to serve in Congress. https://www.politicususa.com/2022/07/13/jim-jordan-delete-tweet.html
https://twitter.com/DashDobrofsky/status/1547311234378186752?s=19
https://twitter.com/kenolin1/status/1547336938364907520?s=19
https://twitter.com/RepSwalwell/status/1547335854515015680?s=19 I hope every Dem member of Congrees continues to bring this up and asked questions by reporters. Spin the answer to this when they can. Do as Repubs do when they believe they have something to hammer others over the head with.
https://twitter.com/AnnaForFlorida/status/1547325778358157313?s=19
https://twitter.com/RepWeinstein/status/1547305421286690816?s=19 Jim Josh pulled be pressured into responding. Don't just let him delete tweet in move on.
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: A happy dog story and meme dump to fix your day
item.description:
A good boy through and through
he still won
he still takes hers I'm pretty sure
support
best hat
Hey guys and gals, we're still trying to support the friend that saved me from suicide earlier this year in the effort of getting his little pup healthy and happy There's an update in the campaign about the progress and it's promissing so we may not be on it much longer. If you can help them out, please do! And have a great day https://gofund.me/96113348
item.dc:creator: thedeadredhead

item.title: Youth Coach Fired After Intentionally Hurting 9-Year Olds On Team He Lost To - He's A Cop.
item.description:
No words.
No, I literally have no words. Fuck this guy. And he's a fucking cop, no less. I mean, of course he is. Jesus. All because he couldn't stand losing to a different team of 9 year olds. Naturally he's been fired from being a coach to a Youth league, but abusing 9 year olds on video out of spite will no doubt never be enough to get him even suspended from his job. Can almost see all his buddies high-fiving him at the station as I type this. Kenneth Wendt. EDIT - UPDATE: "Prospect Baseball coach Victor Torres told the Chronicle that his team and his player's parents were not aware of the incident until they saw the Scorpions' second game on Saturday, which Wendt was allegedly thrown out of. "After they played us, they were scheduled to play another game," Torres said. "When they were playing that game, [Wendt] was harassing one of the kids that was playing first base. He even told him that he was going to meet him in the parking lot." Torres said that after one of the opposing players complained about Wendt in the dugout, the parent that took the original video of Wendt's aggressive behavior started to raise concerns. Torres then discovered Wendt was law enforcement. Upon getting thrown out of the game, Wendt repeatedly said he was "a cop," according to Torres." Source(s): https://www.khou.com/article/news/local/little-league-baseball-coach-fired-rough-encounter-opposing-players-after-loss/285-d9898a7e-7b3d-46bc-a058-6c38bf4999a6 https://www.houstonchronicle.com/neighborhood/spring-klein/article/little-league-coach-viral-video-17299334.php
item.dc:creator: markdotlehtonen

item.title: American fascism
item.description: Please vote to get the fascists out of congress! Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early. #vote
